name: domain
description: Maintain UPPERCASE <NAME>.md (current snapshot) + sister <NAME>.log.md (append-only checkbox-task log) at project root — auto-scaffolds both, defaults NAME to uppercase basename of git root. Verbs: /domain (show) · /domain <task> (append `- [x]`) · /domain todo <task> (`- [ ]`) · /domain done <match> (flip [ ]→[x]) · /domain new <header> · /domain <NAME> <task>. Record progress as work proceeds — log accumulates a checkbox audit trail.
